title: simple texture tweaks
description: This texture pack updates various textures to make Minecraft look cleaner and more visually appealing.
body: Transform your Minecraft experience with this stunning texture pack! It refreshes a variety of textures, elevating the game's aesthetic to a whole new level. Say goodbye to the old and embrace a cleaner, more visually captivating world that enhances your adventures!![player holding totem of undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c23440efb85d87c5487f4dc6f82be1d51ec915.png)
